ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Continued To Dec-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Continued To Dec-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Continued To Nov-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Continued To Oct-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator George Chevalier and the Attorney Jeff L. Strobel to appear on October 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed.

An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for the same date for Attorney Jeff L. Strobel to appear and show cause as to why sanctions under CCP 128 in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear.

Status on close of estate is also continued to October 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.
